name: 11ai-mongodb-operations
description: Modular, safety-first skills for common MongoDB shell and database-tool operations.

interface.longDescription: A modular toolbox for connecting to MongoDB, inspecting databases and collections, performing everyday CRUD and aggregation work, managing indexes, moving data with the Database Tools, and troubleshooting failures with read-first safety checks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai MongoDB operations skills for this database task.
